description: Merge the Team Alpha (Auth Service) and Team Beta (Catalog Service) Docker Compose projects into a single unified stack in '~/projects/merged/'. Resolve all naming and port conflicts—specifically for services ('db'), networks ('backend'), volumes ('db-data'), and host ports (8080, 5432)—to ensure all 6 services (2 APIs, 2 DBs, 1 Redis, 1 Search) can run simultaneously. Update environment variables to maintain connectivity between APIs and their respective renamed databases. Verify the complete stack is running and healthy. Login: user ga, password password123.
